name: kineticadb-agent-skills
description: Kinetica knowledge plugins — teaches AI agents to write correct SQL, build applications, and administer Kinetica's GPU-accelerated database.

plugins.name: kinetica-query
plugins.description: Kinetica SQL query knowledge for data analytics — geospatial, time-series, vector search, graph, and core SQL rules.

plugins.name: kinetica-code
plugins.description: Kinetica application development — Python SDK, REST API, data pipeline patterns, and embedded SQL knowledge.

plugins.name: kinetica-admin
plugins.description: Kinetica database administration — system tables, EXPLAIN plans, resource groups, tier management, and diagnostics.
